column1: 会いたかったが、結局会わずじまいだった。
column2: あいたかったが、けっきょくあわずじまいだった。
column3: I wanted to meet, but in the end I never did.
column4: ずじまい (ended up not doing, never did in the end)
column5: Verb[ない-stem] + ずじまい(だった)
column6: expresses regret or resignation that an intended action was never carried out and the opportunity passed
column7: ずじまい: desired meeting never materialized
column8: ずじまい = never did (opportunity gone); とうとう〜なかった = in the end didn't; とうとう = ultimately; 結局〜なかった = ultimately didn't
